prompt: events.py has stubs for an EventBus class. Implement it so all tests in test_events.py pass. Read the tests carefully — they exercise subtle interactions between priority ordering, handler mutation during dispatch, cascading events, and once semantics.
on_fail: Still failing. The tricky parts: (1) off() during dispatch must prevent the removed handler from running later in the SAME dispatch cycle, (2) cascading emits are synchronous/reentrant, (3) handlers added during dispatch should be visible to cascaded emits but not the current dispatch list.

goals.description: This is extremely hard to get right in one shot. 2 edit calls (initial + fix) and 7 turns is a strong result.
